description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a long, slender barrel and a traditional wooden stock, reminiscent of early to mid-20th century military rifles such as the Lee-Enfield or Mauser. The stock is dark brown and extends from the butt to the fore-end, providing a solid grip and shoulder support. The barrel is black, metallic, and features iron sights at both the front and rear, with visible barrel bands securing it to the stock. The trigger guard and bolt handle are clearly defined, and the rifle appears to have an internal magazine, as there is no visible detachable magazine. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal embellishments, focusing on durability and reliability. The finish is matte, reducing glare and reflection, suitable for practical use in various environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a long black barrel, dark wooden stock, and iron sights, designed for durability and precision. The rifle features a matte finish and a traditional, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, long barrel, iron sights, and bolt handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow profile of the barrel and the front sight post, with minimal visibility of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's length, stock, and barrel bands, with the bolt handle less visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel, with the rear sight and bolt handle slightly visible.
